推荐场景: 合租客厅｜表达/识别边界
60秒任务: 「表达边界」：拒绝/边界/误会修复；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 委婉表达｜误会修复｜情绪支持｜边界｜关系维护｜隐含意图
场景族: 朋友聚会｜家庭客厅｜餐桌｜派对｜聊天场景
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
I’m not comfortable with ___.（表达不适）
I’d rather not talk about that.（拒绝话题）
That feels a bit too personal.（说明边界）
Can we keep this between us?（请求保密）
I need some space right now.（需要空间）
I’m happy to help, but not with ___.（有限帮助）
I can’t take that on right now.（拒绝承担）
Please don’t put me on the spot.（拒绝被逼表态）
I’m okay with ___, but not with ___.（划定范围）
Could we change the subject?（转移话题）
I want to be honest about my limits.（说明限制）
I’m trying to protect my time.（保护时间）
Let’s agree on what’s okay.（共同定规则）
I hope you can respect that.（请求尊重）
This matters to me.（强调重要性）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: boundary, space, privacy, topic, time, favor, pressure, limit
Verbs: respect, ask, push, share, help, avoid, protect, agree
Adjectives / Tone: personal, private, uncomfortable, fair, sensitive, okay
Time / Place: right now, later, in public, at home, in the group chat
Chunks: too personal, put me on the spot, change the subject, respect my limits, keep it between us
